proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_midostaurin have a different overall objective_response rate than patients not receiving treatment_midostaurin (marginal, unadjusted).
Patients receiving treatment_gilteritinib have a different overall objective_response rate than patients not receiving treatment_gilteritinib (marginal, unadjusted).
Patients receiving treatment_ivosidenib have a different overall objective_response rate than patients not receiving treatment_ivosidenib (marginal, unadjusted).
Patients receiving treatment_enasidenib have a different overall objective_response rate than patients not receiving treatment_enasidenib (marginal, unadjusted).
Patients receiving treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine have a different overall objective_response rate than patients not receiving treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine (marginal, unadjusted).
Patients receiving treatment_7plus3 have a different overall objective_response rate than patients not receiving treatment_7plus3 (marginal, unadjusted).

analyses.result_summary: ORR=0.169 on treatment_midostaurin (n=7545) vs 0.169 off (n=42455); diff=-0.0005, chi2 p=0.9228.
ORR=0.163 on treatment_gilteritinib (n=7545) vs 0.170 off (n=42455); diff=-0.0071, chi2 p=0.1344.
ORR=0.171 on treatment_ivosidenib (n=3938) vs 0.169 off (n=46062); diff=+0.0020, chi2 p=0.7625.
ORR=0.161 on treatment_enasidenib (n=3972) vs 0.170 off (n=46028); diff=-0.0086, chi2 p=0.1724.
ORR=0.173 on treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine (n=20020) vs 0.166 off (n=29980); diff=+0.0074, chi2 p=0.0315.
ORR=0.170 on treatment_7plus3 (n=22580) vs 0.168 off (n=27420); diff=+0.0021, chi2 p=0.5397.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with flt3_itd=1, treatment_midostaurin is associated with a higher objective_response rate than no midostaurin.
Among patients with flt3_itd=1, treatment_gilteritinib is associated with a higher objective_response rate than no gilteritinib.
There is a positive interaction (on the log-odds scale) between flt3_itd and treatment_midostaurin in predicting objective_response (i.e., midostaurin's effect is larger in FLT3-ITD+ patients).
There is a positive interaction (on the log-odds scale) between flt3_itd and treatment_gilteritinib in predicting objective_response.
Among patients with flt3_tkd=1, treatment_gilteritinib is associated with a higher objective_response rate than no gilteritinib.

analyses.code: two_prop on flt3_itd==1 stratum, midostaurin yes vs no
analyses.result_summary: In FLT3-ITD+ (n=10000): ORR mido=0.161 vs no-mido=0.174, diff=-0.0123, p=0.2503.

analyses.code: two_prop on flt3_itd==1 stratum, gilteritinib yes vs no
analyses.result_summary: In FLT3-ITD+ (n=10000): ORR gilt=0.169 vs no-gilt=0.172, diff=-0.0034, p=0.7488.
In FLT3-TKD+ (n=2815): ORR gilt=0.141 vs no-gilt=0.166, diff=-0.0253, p=0.1958.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with idh1_mutation=1, treatment_ivosidenib is associated with a higher objective_response rate than no ivosidenib.
There is a positive interaction between idh1_mutation and treatment_ivosidenib on the log-odds of objective_response.
Among patients with idh2_mutation=1, treatment_enasidenib is associated with a higher objective_response rate than no enasidenib.
There is a positive interaction between idh2_mutation and treatment_enasidenib on the log-odds of objective_response.
Cross-targeted: ivosidenib has no benefit (or is harmful) in idh1_mutation==0 patients (i.e., no off-target activity).

analyses.result_summary: In IDH1-wild-type (n=46376): ORR ivo=0.171 vs no-ivo=0.164, diff=+0.0061, p=0.3388.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with unfit_for_intensive=1, treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine is associated with a higher objective_response rate than no ven/aza.
There is a positive interaction between unfit_for_intensive and treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine on the log-odds of objective_response (effect larger in unfit subgroup).
Among unfit_for_intensive=1 patients, treatment_7plus3 is associated with a lower objective_response rate than no 7+3.
There is a negative interaction between unfit_for_intensive and treatment_7plus3 (i.e., 7+3 is relatively worse for unfit patients).

analyses.result_summary: In unfit (n=20056): ORR ven/aza=0.179 vs no-ven/aza=0.163, diff=+0.0162, p=0.0027.

proposed_hypotheses.text: tp53_mutation=1 is associated with a lower objective_response rate vs tp53_mutation=0.
complex_karyotype=1 is associated with a lower objective_response rate vs complex_karyotype=0.
secondary_aml=1 is associated with a lower objective_response rate vs secondary_aml=0.
npm1_mutation=1 is associated with a higher objective_response rate vs npm1_mutation=0 (favorable risk).
After adjusting for tp53_mutation, complex_karyotype, secondary_aml, and npm1_mutation jointly in a logistic model, tp53_mutation remains a significant negative predictor of objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted: tp53 logOR=-0.0267 (OR=0.974, p=0.5060); complex_karyotype logOR=-0.0084 (p=0.8023); secondary_aml logOR=-0.0034 (p=0.9022); npm1 logOR=+0.0419 (p=0.1060).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with higher odds of objective_response (positive effect).
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with lower odds of objective_response (negative effect).
Higher wbc_k_per_ul is associated with lower odds of objective_response.
Higher blast_pct_marrow is associated with lower odds of objective_response.
Higher ecog_ps is associated with lower odds of objective_response.
Higher age_years is associated with lower odds of objective_response.

In a multivariable logistic regression including age_years, ecog_ps, secondary_aml, unfit_for_intensive, complex_karyotype, tp53_mutation, npm1_mutation, flt3_itd, idh1_mutation, idh2_mutation, albumin_g_dl, and ldh_u_l, tp53_mutation remains an independent negative predictor of objective_response.
In the same multivariable model, npm1_mutation remains an independent positive predictor of objective_response.
In the same multivariable model, albumin_g_dl is an independent positive predictor of objective_response.

analyses.code: Logit(orr ~ age + ecog + sec + unfit + complex + tp53 + npm1 + flt3_itd + idh1 + idh2 + alb + ldh)
Logit(orr ~ age + ecog + sec + unfit + complex + tp53 + npm1 + flt3_itd + idh1 + idh2 + alb + ldh)
Logit(orr ~ age + ecog + sec + unfit + complex + tp53 + npm1 + flt3_itd + idh1 + idh2 + alb + ldh)

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a negative interaction between tp53_mutation and treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine on the log-odds of objective_response (i.e., ven/aza benefit is attenuated in TP53+).
Among tp53_mutation==0 patients, treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine is associated with a higher objective_response rate than no ven/aza.
Among tp53_mutation==1 patients, treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine is NOT significantly associated with objective_response (null/attenuated).

analyses.code: two_prop on tp53==0, ven/aza yes vs no
two_prop on tp53==1, ven/aza yes vs no

proposed_hypotheses.text: race_ethnicity is associated with objective_response rate (omnibus chi-square across categories).
insurance_type is associated with objective_response rate (omnibus chi-square).
Patients with insurance_type=='uninsured' have a lower objective_response rate than those with insurance_type=='private'.
rural_residence=1 is associated with a different objective_response rate than rural_residence=0.

analyses.result_summary: Uninsured ORR=0.166 (n=2046) vs Private ORR=0.167 (n=20090); diff=-0.0004, p=0.9656.
Rural ORR=0.169 vs Non-rural ORR=0.169; diff=+0.0000, p=0.9934.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher fatigue_grade is associated with lower odds of objective_response.
Higher pain_nrs is associated with lower odds of objective_response.
sex_female=1 is associated with a different objective_response rate than sex_female=0.
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with lower odds of objective_response.
Higher nlr (neutrophil-lymphocyte ratio) is associated with lower odds of objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: Female ORR=0.171 vs Male ORR=0.168, diff=+0.0033, p=0.3204.

proposed_hypotheses.text: chronic_kidney_disease=1 is associated with a lower objective_response rate.
heart_failure=1 is associated with a lower objective_response rate.
diabetes_mellitus=1 is associated with a different objective_response rate.
prior_malignancy=1 is associated with a different objective_response rate.
prior_chemotherapy=1 is associated with a lower objective_response rate.

After adjusting for age_years, ecog_ps, tp53_mutation, complex_karyotype, secondary_aml, npm1_mutation, the interaction term flt3_itd × treatment_midostaurin remains a significant positive predictor of objective_response.
After the same adjustment, the interaction term flt3_itd × treatment_gilteritinib remains a significant positive predictor of objective_response.
After the same adjustment, the interaction term idh1_mutation × treatment_ivosidenib remains a significant positive predictor of objective_response.
After the same adjustment, the interaction term idh2_mutation × treatment_enasidenib remains a significant positive predictor of objective_response.

analyses.code: Logit(orr ~ age_years + ecog_ps + tp53_mutation + complex_karyotype + secondary_aml + npm1_mutation + flt3_itd + treatment_midostaurin + flt3_itd_x_mido)
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction flt3_itd_x_mido: logOR=-0.1057, OR=0.900, p=0.2158.

analyses.code: Logit(orr ~ age_years + ecog_ps + tp53_mutation + complex_karyotype + secondary_aml + npm1_mutation + flt3_itd + treatment_gilteritinib + flt3_itd_x_gilt)
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction flt3_itd_x_gilt: logOR=+0.0443, OR=1.045, p=0.5988.

analyses.code: Logit(orr ~ age_years + ecog_ps + tp53_mutation + complex_karyotype + secondary_aml + npm1_mutation + idh1_mutation + treatment_ivosidenib + idh1_x_ivo)
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction idh1_x_ivo: logOR=-0.3811, OR=0.683, p=0.0213.

analyses.code: Logit(orr ~ age_years + ecog_ps + tp53_mutation + complex_karyotype + secondary_aml + npm1_mutation + idh2_mutation + treatment_enasidenib + idh2_x_ena)
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction idh2_x_ena: logOR=-0.1230, OR=0.884, p=0.4543.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between flt3_tkd and treatment_gilteritinib (gilteritinib targets both ITD and TKD).
There is a positive interaction between flt3_tkd and treatment_midostaurin.
Within FLT3-ITD-negative patients, treatment_midostaurin is NOT associated with objective_response (no off-target benefit).
There is a positive interaction between npm1_mutation and treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine on the log-odds of objective_response (ven/aza is particularly active in NPM1-mutated AML).

In a logistic regression with all main effects (key clinical, mutational, demographic) and the four targeted-therapy interaction terms (flt3_itd:midostaurin, flt3_itd:gilteritinib, idh1:ivosidenib, idh2:enasidenib), each interaction term is a significant positive predictor of objective_response.

analyses.code: Full multivariable Logit with main effects and 5 interaction terms
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction logORs: flt3_itd_x_mido: logOR=-0.1027 (OR=0.902, p=0.2295); flt3_itd_x_gilt: logOR=+0.0357 (OR=1.036, p=0.6722); idh1_x_ivo: logOR=-0.3787 (OR=0.685, p=0.0222); idh2_x_ena: logOR=-0.1264 (OR=0.881, p=0.4419); unfit_x_venaza: logOR=+0.1055 (OR=1.111, p=0.0341)

proposed_hypotheses.text: At least one of the 25 SNPs (snp_*) is associated with objective_response at p<0.05; specifically, snp_rs1045642, snp_rs1065852, snp_rs1799853, snp_rs1800566, and snp_rs2228001 each have a non-zero log-odds effect on objective_response in univariate logistic regression.
After Bonferroni correction across all 25 SNPs (alpha=0.002), no SNP is associated with objective_response (i.e., the SNPs are noise variables).

analyses.code: univariate Logit(orr ~ snp) for each SNP

analyses.result_summary: At alpha=0.0021: 0 SNPs significant. Hypothesis (SNPs are noise) supported.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among FLT3-ITD+ patients, those who received any FLT3 inhibitor (treatment_midostaurin OR treatment_gilteritinib) have a higher objective_response rate than FLT3-ITD+ patients who received neither FLT3 inhibitor.
Among IDH1-mutated patients, those who received treatment_ivosidenib have a higher objective_response rate than IDH1-mutated patients who did not receive ivosidenib.
Among IDH2-mutated patients, those who received treatment_enasidenib have a higher objective_response rate than IDH2-mutated patients who did not receive enasidenib.

Patients receiving a 'biomarker-matched' targeted therapy (any of: FLT3-ITD+/-TKD with mido or gilt; IDH1+ with ivo; IDH2+ with ena) have a higher objective_response rate than patients without such a match.

analyses.code: FLT3-ITD+ stratum, any FLT3i vs none

analyses.result_summary: Matched-targeted (n=4144) ORR=0.163 vs not-matched (n=45856) ORR=0.170; diff=-0.0064, p=0.2889.
